title: University of Nebraska - Kiewit Hall | Veil Site
paragraphs: portfolio. services. team. innovation. sustainable design. about. contact.
Each of our projects present a unique solution to managing daylight. Explore a detailed look at some of our key projects to see how Veil can add value to your project.

Lincoln, NEKiewit Hall is the new home for the University of Nebraska's engineering and construction students. Veil designed a complete solar tracking roller shade system based on the Draper I/O network, complete with multiple rooftop solar sensors. This facility features nearly 30,000 square feet of Phifer twill (2700) fabric to give the design team independent control of interior and exterior appearance.Project Team: Architect: Clark & Enersen Engineer: Clark & Enersen General Contractor: Kiewit Building GroupProject Awards: AIA Nebraska - People's Choice Award for Excellence in Architecture (2024) AIA Nebraska - Merit Award for Excellence in Architecture (2024)
